title: miconia tococoidea
intro: Miconia tococoidea, also known as the "Toco Tree," is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. The plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The Toco Tree is used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as skin conditions like eczema and wounds, due to its antiseptic and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Miconia tococoidea include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
